html:
2026-0173
2026-02-26TC, FINCanada Marine ActOrder Approving the Supplementary Letters Patent Provision Amending Article 9 of the Letters Patent Issued to the Montreal Port Authority (MPA)Order Approving the Supplementary Letters Patent issued to the Montreal Port Authority (MPA) in order to create a project specific borrowing limit of $1.16 billion, on the power of the MPA to borrow money on its credit for port purposes, to advance the construction of the Contrecoeur Container Terminal Project.N/A
subject: Order Approving the Supplementary Letters Patent Provision Amending Article 9 of the Letters Patent Issued to the Montreal Port Authority (MPA)
precis: Order Approving the Supplementary Letters Patent issued to the Montreal Port Authority (MPA) in order to create a project specific borrowing limit of $1.16 billion, on the power of the MPA to borrow money on its credit for port purposes, to advance the construction of the Contrecoeur Container Terminal Project.
